# Jukebox music

Drop your `.mp3` files directly into this folder. That's it.

- The Jukebox skill scans this folder every time it opens, so any file you add
  shows up automatically the next time you launch it. **No rebuild required.**
- The track name shown on screen comes from the file name (e.g.
  `Daft Punk - One More Time.mp3` shows as `Daft Punk - One More Time`).
  Underscores are turned into spaces and the `.mp3` extension is hidden.
- Only files ending in `.mp3` are listed. Encode as standard MP3 (the robot's
  built-in Chromium can decode it).

## Two ways to load music

1. Add files here, commit, and redeploy the repo with `update-beam.sh` (the robot
   pulls the whole repo).
2. Or copy `.mp3` files straight onto the robot into
   `/opt/jibo/Jibo/Skills/@be/be/node_modules/@be/jukebox/music/` and just relaunch
   the Jukebox skill.
